title: FTX to Distribute $900M to Creditors in Fifth Payment Round
summary: FTX is set to distribute $900 million to creditors as part of its fifth payment round, bringing the total recovered funds to approximately $10 billion since the exchange's bankruptcy filing in 2022. This marks a significant step toward compensating users who lost access to their funds.
body:
FTX has announced plans to distribute $900 million to creditors in its fifth payment round, continuing the recovery process for users affected by the exchange's collapse. Since filing for bankruptcy in November 2022, FTX has managed to recover and distribute around $10 billion in total, a substantial portion of the funds lost by users.

The latest distribution comes as part of ongoing efforts by the FTX Recovery Trust to recompense creditors. This fifth round follows previous distributions that have gradually restored some of the lost assets, providing relief to those who were left in financial limbo after the exchange's downfall.

For everyday users, this distribution represents a crucial step toward financial recovery. Many individuals and businesses were severely impacted by the sudden loss of access to their funds on FTX. The payments, though not fully covering all losses, offer a measure of restitution and help affected parties move forward.

Moving ahead, users should watch for further announcements from the FTX Recovery Trust regarding additional distributions. The trust has indicated that more payments may be forthcoming as the recovery process continues, providing hope for further compensation in the future.
twitterThread: FTX is set to distribute $900M to creditors in its fifth payment round, bringing total recovered funds to $10B since the exchange's November 2022 bankruptcy. This is a big step for users who lost access to their funds.

Since filing for bankruptcy in November 2022, FTX has been working to recover and distribute funds to affected users. The fifth payment round is part of ongoing efforts by the FTX Recovery Trust to compensate creditors.

For users impacted by FTX's collapse, this distribution offers a measure of financial recovery. Keep an eye on future announcements from the FTX Recovery Trust for more updates. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-18-ftx-to-distribute-900m-to-creditors-in-fifth-payment-round
